title: Mixtape Seal (Design Concept)
description: Prove you curated a mixtape with at least N tracks without revealing the tracklist or mixtape ID.
smartWallet: any — uses your connected Smol wallet

designInputs.trackCount: Number of tracks in the mixtape (private)
designInputs.curatorAddress: Hashed wallet address of the curator (private)

designOutputs.trackThreshold: Boolean — mixtape has at least N tracks

verification: On-chain via Protocol 25 BN254 pairing check. Mixtape data sourced from Smol API.
note: Design concept. Would prove curation effort without exposing your taste or specific mixtape, enabling anonymous reputation for curators.
